_comment: cospowers plugin configuration. Defaults point to cospowers's built-in files. Run 'cospowers-configure' skill to replace any value with your own path, skill name, or credential.

project._comment: Project metadata. 'product' identifies the product line (e.g., SCC, SCP, DMP).

env._comment: Service endpoints and credentials. Set DAEDALUS_API_KEY to your personal key (generated in Daedalus → 个人信息 → 我的 API Key). Values here take priority over OS environment variables of the same name.

kb._comment: Knowledge base access. 'skill' is the PRIMARY KB query method — MUST invoke via Skill tool before falling through to localPath. 'localPath' is FALLBACK only.

templates._comment: Template files. Paths relative to plugin root. Replace any value with your own template path.

rules._comment: Rules directories. Paths relative to plugin root. Replace any value with your own rules directory.

evaluators._comment: Quality gate evaluator skills. Replace with your own skill name, or set to false to disable the gate entirely.
